revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''2-3-360

A sodium vapour lamp in which the partial pressure of the vapour during operation is of the order of 104newtons per square metre (0.1 atmosphere).

Reference: C.I.E.

{{IALAFooter}}
